nodes.label: Background worker for enriching library artists and tracks with Genius metadata.

Get next item to process from priority queue.         Genius is artist+track foc
Check if result name matches our query with fuzzy matching
Process a single item (artist or track)

Process an artist: search Genius, get full artist details.         If the artist
Process a track: search Genius, get full song details + lyrics.         If the t
Store Genius metadata for an artist
Store Genius metadata for a track
Mark an entity with a match status
Count how many items still need processing (artists + tracks only)
